case_title: PAUL FULLWOOD VS. HOT SHOT MEDIA, INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF FULLWOOD, PAUL AS TO DEFENDANT HOT SHOT MEDIA, INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION HOT SHOT MEDIA PTY LTD, A FOREIGN CORPORATION HSM VENTURES PTE LTD, A FOREIGN CORPORATION KNOWLEDGE NATION, INC, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
